title: elymus arenarius subsp. mollis
intro: Elymus arenarius subsp. mollis, commonly known as smooth sea couch, is a subspecies of grass in the family Poaceae, characterized by its smooth stems and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The smooth sea couch is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
